raw.official description: Dealing damage with Clobber grants up to 30 Explorer's Resolve shields.
raw.ability details: * Doesn't gain shield when enemy use [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] or [[File:Warding Stance.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Warding Stance|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Warding Stance|Warding Stance]].

abilities.name: Deep Burrow

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Drill Dash distance is 50% longer while while burrowing.

warnings: duration has multiple values; only the first number was parsed.

parse_warnings: duration: duration has multiple values; only the first number was parsed.

raw.official description: While Tectonic Shock is active, cooldowns refresh 300% faster.
raw.ability details: * Grants ''additional'' +300% cooldown refresh rate, meaning that cooldowns tick at 4x speed.

* Total amount of [[shield]] health gained is capped at 75. 
** Using multiple will stack shield health, but not exceed the limit.
* Shields are granted when the ability successfully starts. E.g. in case of Burrow, upon entering underground.
* Clobber does not trigger Explorer's Resolve. (Covered in Dirt Major perk only)
* If Venture takes damage, the shields start regenerating after 1.1 seconds at a rate of 19 shields per second.
* Shields start decaying at the end of the duration at a rate of 30 shield health per second.
** Using an ability resets the decay timer.
** Shield decay timer is paused while using Burrow or Tectonic Shock.
* Shield gain is not prevented by [[anti-heal]] effects.
* Shields are recoverable [[hit points]], which means damage taken by them can be healed until they decay.

raw.official description: While underground, Venture can sense enemies within 25 meters.
SMART Excavator's range is increased by 25%.

abilities.name: Burrow
shot_type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Move underground and become invulnerable. Emerge to deal damage.
raw.cast time:
0.7 + 0 seconds (burrowing)
0 + 0.6 seconds (emerging)
raw.duration:
4 seconds (burrowed)
0.2 seconds (emerging, min charge)
0.65 seconds (emerging, max charge)
1.3 seconds (emerging, max delay))
raw.radius:
2 - 7 meters (max charge, falloff start - max)
1 - 3.5 meters (min charge, falloff start - max)
raw.ability details: * Reveals enemy health bars without having dealt damage to them. * Cooldown starts when the ability finishes casting. * Venture receives a [[movement speed]] penalty while casting, replaced by a movement speed buff once underground. * Pressing primary fire, jump or the ability button again causes Venture to emerge from underground, dealing damage and [[knockback|knocking back]] enemies in the area. ** Holding the button allows Venture to charge the ability, increasing the emerging area, damage dealt and leap speed. ** There is a 0.2 second grace period when the ability's duration ends where emerging can still be charged. * Burrow will replenish Smart Excavator's ammo once underground. * Removes most negative [[status effect]]s and unsticks projectiles when successfully going underground. * While burrowed, Venture can drop down ledges, but only travel up through ramps. * Burrowed Venture cannot pass through [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]], [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] or [[File:Ability-mei2.png|sub|link=Mei#Cryo-Freeze|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Cryo-Freeze|Cryo-Freeze]]. * While underground, Venture cannot be targeted or hit by [[heroes]] or [[object]]s, both allied and enemy. ** When dropping down a ledge, Venture briefly loses the invulnerability and can be targeted and hit by allied and enemy effects. * When an [[File:Ability-zenyatta2.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Orb of Harmony|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Orb of Harmony|Orb of Harmony]] has been applied to Venture earlier, they keep it while underground until they break line of sight. However, [[File:Ability-zenyatta3.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Orb of Discord|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Orb of Discord|Orb of Discord]] is instantly removed, and [[File:Ability-mercy1.png|sub|link=Mercy#Caduceus Staff|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mercy#Caduceus Staff|Caduceus Staff]] is removed after a short period. * When emerging, the damage is dealt before Venture launches up and can destroy mines and traps without harming Venture. * Venture cannot activate traps, elevators or [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] while underground. * If venture starts emerge-charging on [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]] , and Lifeweaver cancels the platform, Venture's burrow will be force-cancelled.'"`UNIQ--ref-0000005E-QINU`"''"`UNIQ--ref-0000005F-QINU`"' ** Lifeweaver can use this technique to quickly place and cancel petal above a burrowed emerge-charging Venture, force-cancelling burrow. * [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]], [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]] and [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] do not affect Venture if they are underground. However, these abilities will prevent activating Burrow if Venture is caught in one of them, and can interrupt Burrow if Venture exposes themself by dropping down a ledge in their area. * Venture can't capture or push objectives while they're underground. They can however contest objectives while underground, such as to prevent enemy progress or stall overtime. * Venture can pick up [[health pack]]s while underground. * Burrow's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap. * Destroys fences and other breakables in the way when traveling underground.

duration.raw:
4 seconds (burrowed)
0.2 seconds (emerging, min charge)

1.3 seconds (emerging, max delay))

raw.official description: Empower SMART Excavator with E to increase its maximum projectile range by 100% for 4 seconds.
raw.ability details: * Cooldown starts when duration ends. * Counts as an ability and triggers [[File:Explorer's Resolve.svg|sub|link=Venture#Explorer's Resolve|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Venture#Explorer's Resolve|Explorer's Resolve]]. * Reloads weapon upon activation. * Is affected by Excavation Exhilaration's 300% Cooldown Reduction.

raw.official description: Launch a seismic charge that bursts after a short distance.
raw.fire rate: 1.67 shots/s
raw.reload time: 1.75 seconds
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 125 while firing (95.24 overall w/reload) * Projectile explodes upon hitting an enemy, terrain or upon reaching its maximum range. * Enemies hit by the shot are [[knocked back]]. * Explosions do not deal self-damage, but will cause a knockback. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but the explosion is unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: Clobber

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.ability details: * The initial hit actually does less damage than standard melee (from 40 to 30). An additional 40 damage is dealt over time (for 70 damage total). * From activation, there is a ~0.2 second active window to deal the initial damage, after which smaller periodic damage is dealt over the remaining duration of the attack. * Damage is not reflected when blocked by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]. * Clobber can be cancelled at any time into Drill Dash, Burrow or Tectonic Shock. * [[Armor]] damage reduction only applies to the initial damage instance.

abilities.name: Drill Dash

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Dash forward while above or underground, pushing enemies back. The cooldown is accelerated while underground.
raw.damage:
30 (first hit)
60 over 0.4 seconds (subsequent hits)
5 (during Burrow)
raw.ability details: * Cooldown starts when the ability is activated. * While Burrow is active, the cooldown of Drill Dash is accelerated by 90%. * Upon hitting an enemy for the first time, they take a small amount of damage. If the enemy stays in contact, they will take additional damage over the remaining duration. * If dashing along ground, inputting jump right at the end of the dash allows Venture to retain momentum and travel slightly farther. * Damage is not reflected when blocked by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]. Genji still gets knocked back, however. * Drill Dash can be interrupted at any point by activating or emerging from Burrow or activating Tectonic Shock. * [[Armor]] damage reduction only applies to the initial damage instance.

raw.shot type: [[File:Tectonic Shock icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Shockwave|Shockwave ]] Shockwave
raw.fire rate: 1.11 shots/s
raw.cast time: 0.8 + 0.3 seconds
raw.ability details: * Tectonic Shock transforms Venture's weapon: ** The ability cannot be interrupted by [[crowd control]] or [[File:Ability Sombra Hack.png|sub|link=Sombra#Hack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#Hack|Hack]]. ** Venture can freely use primary fire to attack. ** Venture can still use Drill Dash and Burrow during the ultimate. * Tectonic Shock cannot be activated or fired while burrowed. * Quick melee/Clobber cannot be used during Tectonic Shock. * Tectonic Shock fires shockwaves that travel along ground. ** If Venture is mid-air while firing a charge, the activation of the shockwave will be delayed until they hit the ground. *** Venture's falling acceleration is tripled if a charge is fired mid-air. ** Shockwaves cannot cross gaps, but can travel along ramps and stairs and will climb up and down ledges within its 2.5m height. ** Enemies hit by the shockwaves take damage and are [[knockup|knocked in the air]]. * Tectonic Shock instantly replenishes Smart Excavator's ammo. ** Venture cannot fire Smart Excavator's normal primary fire during Tectonic Shock, so the replenished ammo can only be used once the ultimate ends.

fire_rate.raw: 1.11 shots/s
